hero.subtitle: Your shortcut to the right bottle in Hong Kong.
hero.desc1: Not sure what to drink? We'll help you decide.
hero.desc2: Want the best price? We'll compare for you.
hero.desc3: Looking for something new? We'll find it.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, region or style...

everyday.title: Everyday Sip
everyday.desc: A little joy after work, without the markup.

explore.title: Explore Something New
explore.desc: The world is wide. Start with one bottle.

ai.sectionDesc: Tell us your occasion, budget or taste preference. Our AI Wine Advisor finds the best three bottles from real wines on our platform.
ai.rec1Reason: Champagne never goes wrong — the pop is the best part.
ai.rec2Reason: The pink bottle is gorgeous, and the taste is light and fresh.
ai.rec3Reason: If she prefers lighter flavours, this one's a safe bet.

merchantCta.text: Are you a merchant? Join Your Wine Book and reach more wine lovers in Hong Kong.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Your Wine Book. All rights reserved.
footer.ageNotice: This platform contains information about alcoholic beverages and is intended for persons aged 18 or above.

search.pageDesc: Search, compare prices, and find your perfect bottle.
search.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or search terms

wine.expandTasting: Learn more: region story, tasting notes

aiPage.pageDesc: Tell me what you need, and I'll find the right wine for you.
aiPage.introDesc: You can share your occasion, budget, taste preferences, or anything on your mind.
aiPage.comingSoon: This is a demo conversation. AI Wine Advisor coming soon.

about.whoDesc: Your Wine Book is a wine discovery platform designed for consumers in Hong Kong. We believe great wine shouldn't be exclusive to experts. Through price comparison, scene-based recommendations, and our AI Wine Advisor, we make it easy for everyone to find the right bottle.
about.what1Desc: The same wine can vary hugely in price across merchants. We help you see it all at a glance.
about.what2Desc: Gifting? Dinner? Everyday? Tell us the occasion, and we'll recommend the best fit.
about.what3Desc: Wine stories told in plain language — no jargon, no pretension.
about.principle1Desc: We don't favour any merchant. We show the most honest prices and information.
about.principle2Desc: All price sources are clearly marked. You know where every dollar goes.
about.principle3Desc: We talk about wine in words you understand. No gatekeeping.
about.contactDesc: Questions or partnership inquiries? Reach out:

join.pageDesc: Join Your Wine Book and let more Hong Kong consumers discover your wines.
join.benefit1Desc: Our users are actively searching for great wines. Targeted traffic, no waste.
join.benefit2Desc: Get your own branded page to showcase your wines and specialties.
join.benefit3Desc: Receive instant order notifications via WhatsApp or Email.

privacy.collectDesc: When you create an account, we collect your email address and display name. As you use our services, we may collect your browsing history, bookmarked wines, search queries, and device information (operating system, browser type). If you use the store locator feature, we collect your location data with your permission.
privacy.useDesc:
We use the information we collect to:
- Provide, maintain, and improve our services
- Recommend wines and stores that suit your preferences
- Send notifications related to your account
- Analyse platform usage to improve user experience
- Prevent abuse and maintain platform security
privacy.shareDesc:
We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following circumstances:
- Anonymised statistics with partner merchants (e.g. wine view counts)
- As required by law or in response to legal process
- With your explicit consent
privacy.cookieDesc: We use cookies to maintain your login session and preferences. We may use analytics tools (such as PostHog) to understand how the platform is used, which may use cookies or similar technologies. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.retentionDesc: We retain your information while your account is active. If you request account deletion, we will remove your personal data within a reasonable timeframe, though we may retain anonymised statistical data.
privacy.rightsDesc:
You have the right to:
- Access the personal information we hold about you
- Request correction of inaccurate information
- Request deletion of your account and associated data
- Withdraw consent for location data collection

To exercise these rights, please contact us using the details below.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have any questions about our privacy policy, please email privacy@yourwinebook.com.

terms.acceptDesc: By using Your Wine Book (the "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to any of these terms, please do not use the Platform.
terms.eligibilityDesc: This Platform provides information and price comparison services for alcoholic beverages. Under Hong Kong law, you must be at least 18 years old to use this Platform. By creating an account, you confirm that you are at least 18 years of age. This Platform does not directly sell alcoholic beverages.
terms.accountDesc: You are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials. Do not share your password with others. You are responsible for all activities conducted through your account. If you discover unauthorised use of your account, please notify us immediately.
terms.contentDesc:
Content you post in the community (posts, comments, etc.) must comply with the following rules:
- Must not contain illegal, defamatory, harassing, or discriminatory content
- Must not contain false or misleading information
- Must not infringe on others' intellectual property rights
- Must not promote underage drinking

We reserve the right to remove content that violates these rules and to suspend accounts.
terms.pricingDesc: Wine prices displayed on this Platform are sourced from our partner merchants and are for reference only. Actual prices are subject to the merchant's official pricing. While we strive to ensure pricing accuracy, we make no guarantees regarding the accuracy, timeliness, or completeness of pricing information.
terms.ipDesc: The design, text, icons, and branding elements of this Platform are protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, or distribute the Platform's content without written permission. Wine names, winery names, and other trademarks belong to their respective owners.
terms.disclaimerDesc: This Platform is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties. We are not liable for any direct, indirect, or incidental damages arising from the use of this Platform. Please drink responsibly and never drink and drive.
terms.contactDesc: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please email legal@yourwinebook.com.
